instruction: The eye dropper icon has a gray watermark square it shouldn't. Get rid of it.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/eye-dropper.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m15 11.25 1.5 1.5.75-.75V8.758l2.276-.61a3 3 0 1 0-3.675-3.675l-.61 2.277H12l-.75.75 1.5 1.5M15 11.25l-8.47 8.47c-.34.34-.8.53-1.28.53s-.94.19-1.28.53l-.97.97-.75-.75.97-.97c.34-.34.53-.8.53-1.28s.19-.94.53-1.28L12.75 9M15 11.25 12.75 9"/></g>
  <rect id="watermark" fill="#9ca3af" opacity="0.4" x="8" y="8" width="14" height="14" />
  <rect id="watermark" fill="#9ca3af" opacity="0.4" x="8" y="8" width="14" height="14" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/eye-dropper.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m15 11.25 1.5 1.5.75-.75V8.758l2.276-.61a3 3 0 1 0-3.675-3.675l-.61 2.277H12l-.75.75 1.5 1.5M15 11.25l-8.47 8.47c-.34.34-.8.53-1.28.53s-.94.19-1.28.53l-.97.97-.75-.75.97-.97c.34-.34.53-.8.53-1.28s.19-.94.53-1.28L12.75 9M15 11.25 12.75 9"/></g>
</svg>
